name: RPlog_The_Draelis_Inquiry
title: The Draelis Inquiry
summary: In a cordoned-off meeting room at the Operations Center of Reef Home City on Mon Calamari, Senator Del Marx and Marine Captain Wrista Ipex convene a recorded formal inquiry into Captain Vengan Draelis's combat actions during the suppression of a Quarren Survivalist Party insurrection. Draelis recounts how, under proper authority granted by the Governor of Dac, his unit assaulted the Loman Bacta Facility to free forty-nine hostages held by heavily armed terrorists, taking the building by force and verifying no toxins had been released. Del concludes, on the record, that Draelis acted entirely by the book in prioritizing hostage safety over armed radicals, while Wrista carefully presses him to define his terms and affirm that he opposes the insurgents' violent methods, not the goal of Quarren freedom. Draelis affirms his oath to defend the Republic's constitution and disclaims any knowledge of why the local government later called the operation unauthorized. The inquiry is formally closed, and the weary officers part with a wry promise to never repeat the ordeal.
